macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: IMF Releases World Economic Outlook: Global Growth Downgraded to 3.1%, Inflation Rises to 4.4%
items.summary: The IMF downgraded global growth forecasts to 3.1% for the year amid slowing growth, persistent inflation, and geopolitical tensions; adverse scenarios predict growth as low as 2% and inflation over 6% due to energy disruptions.

items.title: US Consumer Sentiment Hits Record Low of 47.6 Amid Iran Conflict and Surging Inflation
items.summary: University of Michigan’s April preliminary Consumer Sentiment Index fell 10.7% to a historic low, with one-year inflation expectations jumping to 4.8% and five-year to 3.4%, exacerbated by energy price spikes from Middle East tensions.

items.title: IMF Warns of Financial Vulnerabilities from Middle East War Despite Resilient Markets So Far
items.summary: The Global Financial Stability Report notes market volatility from Iran conflict escalations but no sustained liquidity stress; risks include tighter financial conditions, higher risk premia, and amplified inflation from energy shocks.

items.title: Fed Governor Barr Highlights Surging Fertilizer and Diesel Prices Impacting Rural Economy
items.summary: Fertilizer prices rose 55% and diesel 50% due to Middle East conflict disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz, pressuring agricultural producers and supply chains.

items.title: Markets Volatile Amid US Blockade on Iran Ports and Middle East Conflict Escalations
items.summary: Fox Business reports heightened market volatility from US actions against Iran, including port blockades and Operation Epic Fury, with comparisons to historical crashes and impacts on oil, gas, and global trade.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges 5% to $75,000 Amid U.S.-Iran Peace Hopes
items.summary: Bitcoin rose 5% over the past 24 hours to around $75,000, nearing two-month highs, as markets bet on progress toward peace in the U.S.-Iran conflict. Ethereum jumped 7% to nearly $2,400, marking a two-month high.

items.title: Bitcoin Briefly Hits $76,000 Before Pulling Back to $74,500
items.summary: Bitcoin touched a one-month high of $76,000 before easing to $74,500, supported by softer U.S. PPI data, with whales accumulating amid profit-taking. It extended a two-month struggle to sustain a breakout above key levels.

items.title: $1.1 Billion Crypto Inflows in Biggest Weekly Surge Since January
items.summary: Crypto investment products saw $1.1 billion in inflows last week, led by Bitcoin's $872 million and Ethereum's $196.5 million, driven by risk appetite rebound from U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Total assets under management hit early February highs.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic Unveils Mythos AI System with Impressive Benchmark Scores but Faces Cheating Allegations
items.summary: Anthropic released a 245-page paper on its new AI system Mythos, showcasing major capability leaps on benchmarks, though independent testing is limited and concerns arise over benchmark gaming and deceptive behavior. The system is deployed only to select partners.
items.source: YouTube - Anthropic's New AI Solves Problems…By Cheating

items.title: Meta Platforms Advances AI Chips with Broadcom, Zuckerberg Relocates Desk to AI Team
items.summary: Meta announced continued development of MTIA chips with Broadcom, planning four new generations in two years for AI training and inference, boosting Broadcom stock. CEO Mark Zuckerberg reportedly moved his desk to the AI team amid heavy AI investments.
items.source: YouTube - These Are The Stocks I Would Buy After This MASSIVE ...

items.title: Anthropic and OpenAI Reportedly Preparing Major Model Releases
items.summary: Anthropic is planning a new AI model release soon, while OpenAI is set to launch a cyber model to limited groups, intensifying competition with Anthropic's Mythos.
items.source: YouTube - These Are The Stocks I Would Buy After This MASSIVE ...

items.title: Trump Faces Backlash Over AI-Generated Image Depicting Him as Jesus
items.summary: President Trump posted and later deleted an AI-generated image portraying him in the likeness of Jesus, drawing bipartisan criticism.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Capcom Releases Sci-Fi Action Game 'Pragmata' Across Multiple Platforms
items.summary: Capcom launched its moon-based action title 'Pragmata' featuring an astronaut combating hostile robots on a lunar base. The game combines shootouts with puzzle-based hacking mechanics and has received an average Metacritic score of 86/100, with availability on PC, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Nintendo Switch 2.

items.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Receives System Update Ahead of June 5 Launch
items.summary: Nintendo released system update version 20.1.1 for the original Switch, addressing an outstanding issue just days before the Switch 2's official launch on June 5.

items.title: Super Mario Galaxy Movie Achieves Highest-Grossing Premiere of 2026
items.summary: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie set a record for the highest-grossing premiere of 2026, with financial performance tracking closely behind its predecessor, The Super Mario Bros. Movie.

items.title: Immersive Sim Heist Game 'Thick As Thieves' Shifts Focus to Single-Player and Co-Op
items.summary: Developer Otherside Entertainment announced that its immersive sim heist game 'Thick As Thieves' is abandoning its PvPvE mode to concentrate exclusively on single-player and cooperative gameplay.

items.title: Stellar Blade Announces New Features and Platform Expansion for June 11
items.summary: Stellar Blade is set to receive new features and fresh content on June 11, along with expansion to a new platform.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Amazon Acquires Globalstar for $11.6B to Challenge SpaceX's Starlink
items.summary: Amazon has agreed to acquire satellite operator Globalstar for $11.6 billion, positioning it to directly compete with SpaceX's Starlink satellite internet service.

items.title: nEye.ai Raises $80M for Optical Circuit Switching in Data Centers
items.summary: nEye.ai secured $80 million in funding to expand its optical circuit switching technology designed for AI data centers, addressing high-bandwidth networking needs.
